summary: One unit test failed during the Gradle test task: DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion failed with an assertion that the owner version was incremented when it should not have been.
root_cause: The test org.hibernate.orm.test.version.db.DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion failed with an assertion error: the test expected the owner version to not be incremented but observed it was incremented.

evidence.reason: Shows which test failed in the test run.

evidence.quote: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: owner version not incremented ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>

suggested_fix: Open the test report at hibernate-core/target/reports/tests/test/index.html and inspect org.hibernate.orm.test.version.db.DbVersionTest (line 60). Reproduce the failure locally by running: ./gradlew :hibernate-core:test --tests org.hibernate.orm.test.version.db.DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion and then adjust the code or the test so the owner's version behavior matches the asserted expectation (or update the test if the expected behavior changed).
